name: q
label: Search Query
help: Search query matched against usernames, display names and bios.

name: limit
label: Limit
help: Max items to return. Default 20, max 100. Billed per result.

name: cursor
label: Cursor
help: Pagination offset. Leave at 0 for the first page; then pass the nextCursor value from the previous response. A null nextCursor means the end.

name: cache
label: Cache
help: Set true to serve from the 24h response cache. Default false — always fetch fresh data.
